_note: Edit observed_symbols to flip example C between C1 and C2: removing 'openssl.RAND_bytes' makes x_run=0.25 (other symbols observed); removing all openssl symbols makes x_run=0.0 (package loaded but no symbol info → falls back via the 'package loaded, no symbol observed' branch — actually returns 0.5; to get C1=0.0 entirely, remove 'openssl' from loaded_packages too).
